2.title: RAG for E-Commerce
2.desc: Built and deployed a domain-specific Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipeline for e-commerce: semantic chunking and pgvector similarity search over PostgreSQL with streaming LLM chat responses. Delivered full-stack — frontend UI plus API and concurrent load testing — and shipped to production on Kubernetes via GitOps (ArgoCD) for self-healing, scalable serving.

3.title: TensorRT Inference Optimization
3.desc: Optimized deep-learning inference with NVIDIA TensorRT, achieving a 4-5x latency speedup over the baseline runtime. Applied FP16 mixed-precision quantization, operator and layer fusion, and dynamic batching to maximize GPU throughput, with accuracy validated against the original model for production serving.

4.title: Thai Image Captioning
4.desc: Adapted the state-of-the-art mPLUG vision-language model to support Thai-language image captioning. Implemented a custom BertTokenizer and BertDecoder to handle Thai script and sub-word segmentation, then fine-tuned the multimodal encoder-decoder to generate fluent, context-aware captions from input images.
4.skills: Python, PyTorch, Hugging Face, mPLUG, BERT

5.title: Extractive Question Answering
5.desc: Built a fine-tuning pipeline for extractive question answering on a BERT-base language model. Answer spans are located within a passage by predicting start and end token positions, trained with span-based position encoding over context. Covers data preprocessing, tokenization, and evaluation on context-based QA datasets.
5.skills: Python, PyTorch, Hugging Face, BERT, Transformers

6.title: AI Flashcard Generator
6.desc: An AI-driven flashcard generation system and first-place winner of the Llama 3 Hackathon. Uses Llama 3 with Retrieval-Augmented Generation to extract content from uploaded PDFs and convert it into personalized, interactive study cards, with semantic retrieval, automatic question-answer generation, and integrated progress tracking.

7.title: Efficient Chess AI
7.desc: A memory-constrained chess engine built for the FIDE & Google Efficient Chess AI Challenge, where strict memory limits rule out large engines. Generated large-scale self-play and hand-crafted-evaluation datasets to train a compact neural-network position evaluator paired with search. Ranked 500 of 1120 entries.

8.title: AI To-Do List Agent
8.desc: An LLM agent skill that automates task tracking and prioritization. Provides custom tools for the OpenClaw agent to read Excel spreadsheets and fetch LINE group-chat history, then summarizes outstanding tasks and ranks them by priority from conversation context. Deployed as a gateway service with a Python tool layer.
8.skills: Python, LLM Agents, openpyxl, REST API, LINE API
